overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched urban underpass transitioning to a busy intersection. The environment features wet reflective streets, massive holographic billboards, futuristic architecture, and dense cyberpunk city atmosphere with heavy artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the overpass, passing digital billboards and concrete benches

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass ceiling and support beams spanning the walkway
large digital billboard displaying advertisement with face and text BEST PRICE THROAT CUT OPERATOR
yellow metal railings separating pedestrian walkway from the street
standalone illuminated pillar with rotating advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city at night. The walkway is lined with digital billboards and advertising pillars, while yellow railings separate the path from the adjacent road. The ground is wet and reflective, suggesting recent rain, though the area is sheltered from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underpass corridor with corporate advertisements and concrete walls

events.description: ambient light decreases significantly as moving deeper under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the darker section of the underpass, passing a seated individual on a bench

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench looking at a device

entered.detail: large corporate digital display showing Arasaka branding and advertisements
rough textured concrete support walls and pillars of the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows and darkens as the camera moves deeper under the overpass. Arasaka corporate billboards illuminate the right side while rough concrete walls line the left. A lone individual sits on a bench as the environment becomes more enclosed and shadowed.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from underpass to open intersection with illuminated building facade

events.description: exiting the enclosed underpass into a more open area with visible sky and distant buildings
dramatic increase in brightness from large illuminated building facade with vertical light strips

agents.ego_description: approaching a brightly lit intersection, walking past concrete benches and road barriers

entered.detail: massive building front with vertical golden light strips and large advertisement banners
yellow painted lines on the wet pavement indicating pedestrian crossing area
ground-level shop windows with neon lighting and digital signage

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up as the camera exits the underpass, revealing a stunning view of a massive building facade illuminated by vertical golden light strips. The wet pavement creates dramatic reflections of the neon lights. The scene transitions from enclosed darkness to an open, brightly lit intersection approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy neon-lit intersection with crosswalk and commercial storefronts

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection, following the crosswalk markings
slight turn to the right while continuing forward to navigate around pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection crosswalk while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing by illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: man in suit walking briskly past the camera in the opposite direction
woman walking across the crosswalk ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes spanning the multi-lane road
commercial buildings with bright neon signage including EL GAUCHO and other illuminated brands
suspended traffic signals and street lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide-open intersection bathed in intense neon light from surrounding storefronts and billboards. Pedestrians walk in various directions across the wet crosswalk, their reflections shimmering on the pavement. The massive illuminated building now stands to the left as the camera navigates through the moderate crowd toward the opposite side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban walkway that gradually transitions from an open underpass into a more enclosed, shadowed corridor. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where digital billboards and advertising pillars line a wet, reflective path bordered by yellow railings. As the camera moves forward, the space begins to narrow and the lighting dims, shifting the focus toward glowing Arasaka corporate billboards on the right. The scene then deepens into a more oppressive atmosphere as rough concrete walls close in on the left, passing a lone individual seated on a bench before the environment becomes fully enveloped in shadow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed darkness of an urban underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched brilliance of a city intersection. It begins as the camera exits the tunnel, revealing a massive building facade illuminated by vertical golden light strips that cast dramatic reflections across the wet pavement. As the space opens up, the scene shifts from the sheltered approach to a wide-open crossing bathed in intense light from surrounding storefronts and holographic billboards. The camera then navigates through a moderate crowd of pedestrians shimmering on the damp crosswalk, leaving the illuminated building to the left while moving toward the opposite side of the street.
